overnight_news: **Iran expands strikes across Middle East**: Escalating tensions drive oil spikes, inflation fears; impacts energy (oil majors), broad indices (Dow, S&P, Nasdaq).[1]
**Oil prices surge 4-6% (Brent $81, WTI $74)**: Supply disruption fears via Strait of Hormuz; boosts energy stocks (XLE), weighs on airlines/cruise lines.[1][2]
**Trump orders US guarantees for Gulf maritime trade**: Eases some oil price gains, supports shipping/energy flow; mixed market reaction.[1]
**Treasury yields rise, Fed cut expectations delayed to Sept**: Inflation worries from oil curb rate cut bets; pressures rate-sensitive sectors.[1]
**Defense stocks rally (e.g., NOC +6%)**: Geopolitical risks boost military spending outlook; tech (NVDA +3%) offsets losses.[2]
